title: lupinus bicolor var. rostratus
intro: Lupinus bicolor var. rostratus, also known as the rostrate or spurred lupine, is a variety of the lupine plant that is native to the western United States. It is a perennial plant known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and congestion, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lupinus bicolor var. rostratus include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Lupinus bicolor var. rostratus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
